[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / asin

# Method: asin()

```ts
asin(value): number;
```

Calculate the arc sine of a value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value in the range -1 to 1. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in radians.

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="asin" encoded-code="-" />
